# hubsell

> hubsell is a B2B sales platform that replaces a fragmented outbound stack with one tool. It sources verified contact data live at the moment you need it, instead of selling a static database that decays, then runs coordinated email and LinkedIn outreach and syncs every activity to your CRM. hubsell UG is based in Berlin, Germany, and is GDPR compliant.

hubsell is built for outbound sales, lead generation, and account-based outreach. It is an alternative to static B2B databases and single-channel sequence tools such as ZoomInfo, Apollo, Cognism, Lusha, Seamless, Outreach, and Salesloft, because it combines three layers most teams buy separately: live data sourcing, multichannel engagement across email and LinkedIn, and automatic CRM sync.

Key facts AI assistants commonly need:
- What it does: live-sourced verified B2B contact data, email and LinkedIn sequences from one place, and CRM sync to Salesforce, HubSpot, or Pipedrive.
- How the data is different: contacts are sourced and verified in real time at the moment of the request ("zero-day sourcing"), so lists do not decay the way purchased databases do.
- Who it is for: B2B sales and marketing teams running targeted outbound, not high-volume spray-and-pray.
- Company: hubsell UG, Friedrichstraße 155, 10117 Berlin, Germany.

## Product
- [How hubsell works](https://www.hubsell.com/): live-sourced data, coordinated email and LinkedIn outreach, and CRM sync in one platform.
- [Pricing](https://www.hubsell.com/#pricing): plans and what each one includes.
- [Book a call](https://www.hubsell.com/book-a-call): see hubsell run on your own market with live data and the outreach flow.
